requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality (Estonia)
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP、EMC、无线模块及电能质量（爱沙尼亚）
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP、EMC、無線模組及電能品質（愛沙尼亞）

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Estonia should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or Elektrilevi/Elering-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards under the EU EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional obligations under RED 2014/53/EU for wireless-enabled products. Estonia has an advanced digital infrastructure and e-service culture; Estonian operators and project owners commonly expect OCPP 1.6 or OCPP 2.0.1 compliance for networked public chargers. Baltic roaming and EU interoperability (e.g., via Hubject eRoaming platform) may require additional backend connectivity configuration.
summary.zh: 在爱沙尼亚，若充电点运营商、车队运营方、公共部门项目或Elektrilevi/Elering相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应符合欧盟电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU下的IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据无线设备指令2014/53/EU触发无线使能产品的额外义务。爱沙尼亚拥有先进的数字基础设施和电子服务文化；爱沙尼亚运营商和项目业主通常期望联网公共充电桩符合OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1。波罗的海漫游和欧盟互操作（如通过Hubject eRoaming平台）可能需要额外的后台连接配置。
summary.zht: 在愛沙尼亞，若充電點運營商、車隊運營方、公共部門項目或Elektrilevi/Elering相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應符合歐盟電磁相容指令2014/30/EU下的IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質標準。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據無線設備指令2014/53/EU觸發無線使能產品的額外義務。愛沙尼亞擁有先進的數字基礎設施和電子服務文化；愛沙尼亞運營商和項目業主通常期望聯網公共充電樁符合OCPP 1.6或OCPP 2.0.1。波羅的海漫遊和歐盟互操作（如通過Hubject eRoaming平台）可能需要額外的後台連接配置。

standards_or_laws: OCPP 1.6 / OCPP 2.0.1 — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality (mandatory under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU)
Directive 2014/30/EU (EMC Directive) — mandatory for all EV chargers placed on the EU/Estonian market
Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — mandatory for EV chargers with integrated wireless communication modules
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
Estonian Communications Board (Sideamet) — radio spectrum and communications module type-approval requirements for Estonia

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment (Alipay, WeChat Pay), SIM/cloud platforms, and operator integrations (State Grid, Southern Grid, TELD) that need reconfiguration for Estonian operators, Baltic roaming, Estonian-language interfaces, Euro currency, and OCPP-based data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付（支付宝、微信支付）、SIM卡/云平台和运营商集成（国家电网、南方电网、特来电），需要为爱沙尼亚运营商、波罗的海漫游、爱沙尼亚语界面、欧元货币和基于OCPP的数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付（支付寶、微信支付）、SIM卡/雲平台和運營商集成（國家電網、南方電網、特來電），需要為愛沙尼亞運營商、波羅的海漫遊、愛沙尼亞語界面、歐元貨幣和基於OCPP的數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China operator-specific back-office protocols (State Grid, Southern Grid, TELD etc.)
China radio module approvals where applicable (SRRC type-approval for Chinese frequency bands)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version (1.6 or 2.0.1 recommended for Estonia), charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment flow (contactless, bank card, RFID — Alipay/WeChat are not standard in Estonia), SIM or communications module approval path (Estonian Communications Board, Sideamet, for radio modules used in Estonia), and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Estonian configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. For wireless modules: RED 2014/53/EU conformity assessment and CE DoC must cover the radio module used in Estonian frequency bands; Chinese SRRC-only radio approvals are not valid for Estonia. Cold-climate EMC: EMC test conditions should include the temperature range expected during Estonian winter operation.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终爱沙尼亚配置的OCPP版本（爱沙尼亚推荐OCPP 1.6或2.0.1）、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付流程（非接触式、银行卡、RFID——支付宝/微信在爱沙尼亚非标准支付方式）、SIM或通信模块审批路径（用于爱沙尼亚的无线模块须经爱沙尼亚通信局Sideamet审批），以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。对于无线模块：无线设备指令2014/53/EU合格评定和CE符合性声明须涵盖在爱沙尼亚频段使用的无线模块；中国SRRC-only无线审批在爱沙尼亚无效。低温气候EMC：EMC测试条件应包括爱沙尼亚冬季运行预期的温度范围。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終愛沙尼亞配置的OCPP版本（愛沙尼亞推薦OCPP 1.6或2.0.1）、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付流程（非接觸式、銀行卡、RFID——支付寶/微信在愛沙尼亞非標準支付方式）、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑（用於愛沙尼亞的無線模組須經愛沙尼亞通訊局Sideamet審批），以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。對於無線模組：無線設備指令2014/53/EU合格評定和CE符合性聲明須涵蓋在愛沙尼亞頻段使用的無線模組；中國SRRC-only無線審批在愛沙尼亞無效。低溫氣候EMC：EMC測試條件應包括愛沙尼亞冬季運行預期的溫度範圍。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 61000 EMC compliance under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU is mandatory for all EV chargers on the Estonian market; OCPP is functionally mandatory for networked public and commercial chargers in the Estonian market context; RED 2014/53/EU applies to wireless-enabled chargers; Estonian Communications Board (Sideamet) approval is required for radio modules used in Estonia.
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP, CCS2 back-office evidence, or EU CE EMC evidence

source.publisher: Estonian Centre for Standardisation and Accreditation (EVS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Estonian networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration (1.6 or 2.0.1), IEC 61000 EMC and power quality under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, RED compliance for wireless modules, and Estonian Communications Board (Sideamet) radio module approval. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, EU EMC CE, or back-office interoperability needs. Chinese payment integrations (Alipay/WeChat) should be replaced with EU-compatible payment methods for Estonian market deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 爱沙尼亚联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成（1.6或2.0.1）、电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU下的IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、无线模块的无线设备指令合规，以及爱沙尼亚通信局（Sideamet）无线模块审批。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信、欧盟CE EMC或后台互操作需求。应将中国支付集成（支付宝/微信）替换为爱沙尼亚市场适用的欧盟兼容支付方式。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 愛沙尼亞聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成（1.6或2.0.1）、電磁相容指令2014/30/EU下的IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質、無線模組的無線設備指令合規，以及愛沙尼亞通訊局（Sideamet）無線模組審批。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊、歐盟CE EMC或後台互操作需求。應將中國支付集成（支付寶/微信）替換為愛沙尼亞市場適用的歐盟兼容支付方式。
